title: Tool Design, Errors, Pagination, and Context Efficiency · Skill Brief: Errors Recovery
summary: Refine an MCP server whose tools are ambiguous and return too much data. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext errors recovery increment in an efficient tool API and evaluation suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Return actionable domain errors without exposing secrets or stack internals.
Write discriminative descriptions, constrained schemas, examples, and side-effect metadata.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
